data.name: G Squad: Bonkageddon
data.detailed_description:
A mysterious curse is turning the queendom mad with lust! The 9 ladies of G-squad are all that remain of the border scouts. Their only chance to warn the queen of the impending bonkageddon is to run from dawn till dusk… before desire completely overtakes them.

9 unique heroes

Summoner. Stunner. Assassin. Mage. Inventor. Tank. Warlock. Healer. Archer.

Deploy and level up your heroes. Use the unique skills of each G Squad member to tailor your strategy to the challenge at hand.

Gameplay-first, boob-a-plenty strategy

Run through 5 unique environments, each guarded by increasingly dangerous bosses. Every vanquished boss grants hero-specific equipment to enhance or drastically change your strategy. Completing a run grants career XP for permanent progression.

Get rewarded for playing well

Enjoy sexual content that’s fully integrated into the gameplay. Level up your heroes to unlock destructible clothing and nudity, or grant them the ability to seduce enemies.

No defeat-based or forced sex. When your heroes run out of stamina, they give in to their lust—with themselves.

Scratch the strategy itch one-handed

In a simple, fun, mouthful-of-boob sized package. In-built streamer and safe-for-work modes. Easy to dip in and out of, no spreadsheets required.

data.short_description: Gameplay-first, hand-crafted autobattler with roguelite and RPG elements. Sexy stuff built into the gameplay. Battle from dawn till dusk. Alert the queen. Prevent bonkageddon.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 and Windows 11
  • 處理器: x86, x64 architecture with SSE2 instruction set support.
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DX10, DX11, DX12 capable.
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
